title: manisuris coelorachis
intro: Manisuris coelorachis, also known as the golden thread grass or Manisuris, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Manisuris coelorachis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Manisuris coelorachis can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
